name: TRSMapObject.TrackTarget

source_snippet: function TRSMapObject.Hover(attempts: Int32 = 2; trackTarget: Boolean = TRSMapObject.TrackTarget)

name: TRSMapObject.Filter
signature: Filter: record Walker: Boolean; Minimap: Boolean; Finder: Boolean; UpText: Boolean; end;
summary: Nested record in TRSMapObject controlling which detection passes are active. Walker=world-coord lookup, Minimap=dot filter, Finder=color search, UpText=text verify. All True by default after Setup/Objects.Get.

name: TRSMapObject.Coordinates
summary: Field of TRSMapObject. World-coordinate tile positions (real RuneScape coordinates) where the object or NPC exists. Populated by Objects.Get() or set manually in SetupEx.

name: TRSMapObject.Finder
summary: Field of TRSMapObject. Holds the color definitions (CTS2) used for mainscreen color-based detection. Append colors with obj.Finder.Colors += [CTS2(...)].

name: TRSMapObject.Walker
summary: Field of TRSMapObject. Pointer to the active walker — MUST be set to @Map.Walker before any Hover/WalkHover/Click/WalkClick call. A nil Walker causes a runtime crash.

name: TRSMapObject.Size
summary: Field of TRSMapObject. Three-dimensional tile size of the object (X width, Y depth, Z height). Used to project a bounding box onto the mainscreen.

name: TRSObjectV2.ObjType
summary: Field of TRSObjectV2. Integer object-type identifier from game data. Exact set of valid values not documented in source.
uncertainty: unclear from source — exact valid values not stated

name: TRSObjectV2.Rotations
summary: Field of TRSObjectV2. Array of rotation angles for multi-orientation objects. Unit of values not stated in source.

name: TRSNPCV2.Level
summary: Field of TRSNPCV2. Combat level of the NPC as an integer.

name: TRSNPCV2.DotType
summary: Field of TRSNPCV2. Specifies which minimap dot category to filter when searching for this NPC. Set to ERSMinimapDot.NPC for standard NPCs.

name: TRSNPCV2.DotFilters
summary: Field of TRSNPCV2. Array of polygon/area filters restricting which minimap dots are accepted as this NPC. Add entries via AddFilter().
